Islam.quote: And whoever puts their trust in God, He will be enough for them.
Islam.meaning: Trust and sincere effort can bring inner peace during uncertainty. Reflection 1.

Islam.quote: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
The best among you are those who have the best manners.
And whoever puts their trust in God, He will be enough for them.

Buddhism.quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
Buddhism.meaning: Inner peace begins in the mind. Reflection 1.

Buddhism.quote: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
If your compassion does not include yourself, it is incomplete.
Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
Buddhism.meaning: Inner peace begins in the mind. Reflection 2.

Hinduism.quote: You have the right to work, but never to the fruit of work.
Hinduism.meaning: Focus on effort rather than outcomes. Reflection 1.

Hinduism.quote: A person can rise through the efforts of their own mind.
When meditation is mastered, the mind is unwavering.
You have the right to work, but never to the fruit of work.
Hinduism.meaning: Focus on effort rather than outcomes. Reflection 2.
